title: Red Velvet Happiness Diary: My Dear, ReVe1uv in Cinemas
original_title: 레드벨벳 해피니스 다이어리 : 마이 디어, 레베럽 인 시네마
overview: From their debut track "Happiness" to timeless hits like "Ice Cream Cake", "Red Flavor", "Psycho", "Feel My Rhythm", and "Cosmic", Red Velvet has solidified their place as an iconic artist creating unforgettable songs that transcend time. Experience the dazzling live performances from the 2024 Red Velvet FANCON TOUR 〈HAPPINESS : My Dear, ReVe1uv〉 in SEOUL, along with behind-the-scenes stories told directly by the members themselves about the music and cherished moments they've created over the past 10 years. A spectacular finale to Red Velvet's 10th Anniversary celebration!
